name: rptc
description: Research -> Plan -> TDD -> Commit workflow with quality gates, test-driven implementation, and documentation review.

interface.shortDescription: Research, plan, implement with TDD, verify, and ship.
interface.longDescription: RPTC packages a provider-agnostic Research -> Plan -> TDD -> Commit workflow for Codex. It includes reusable workflow skills, methodology references, SOPs, and verification guidance for feature work, bug fixes, research, structure reviews, and commit preparation.
defaultPrompt: Use RPTC to implement this feature.
Use RPTC to fix this bug.
